patient_history: 74-year-old right-handed retired teacher with 2 years of progressive episodic memory decline, repeating questions and misplacing items; independent in basic ADLs with mild IADL difficulty. No parkinsonism or visual hallucinations.
impression: Amnestic mild cognitive impairment progressing toward mild dementia with a biomarker profile (amyloid-positive PET, low CSF Aβ42, elevated p-tau181, hippocampal atrophy, temporoparietal hypometabolism; ATN A+T+N+) consistent with MCI due to Alzheimer's disease. APOE e3/e4 increases risk. Recommend cognitive follow-up, discuss amyloid-targeting therapy eligibility and ARIA risk given biomarker confirmation, and optimize vascular risk factors.
